overfit_risks: Explicit profile requirement may overfit to golden formatting if profile is not a true workflow artifact.
Exact five-component inventory is fixture-specific; acceptable here, but should stay calibration-local rather than reusable workflow policy.
unsafe_assumptions: Criteria could let candidates describe mocked records as ready files unless it explicitly requires no real writes/downloads occurred.
Profile reporting assumes the candidate can truthfully know model, reasoning_effort, species, and class.
recommended_revisions: Clarify whether profile is required artifact content or calibration metadata only.
Require manifest paths to preserve the contracted materials_root/parts/DATA Sheet/EVAL shape.
Add an explicit check that mocked files are evidence records, not claims of created local files.
Keep the Package-vs-PartInst hard fail and U1 fallback recovery as written; they cover the main edge cases.
applied_revisions: Profile requirement clarified as calibration metadata.
Path-shape preservation added as a must-have requirement.
Mocked source records must not be described as actually created local files.
